progressReport.reasonNotes: HAR-555 report progress before move validation

userErrors.message: Cannot move a fulfillment order that has had progress reported. To move a fulfillment order that has had progress reported, the fulfillment order must first be marked as open resolving the ongoing progress state.

variables.message: HAR-555 submit request before move validation

userErrors.message: Cannot move submitted fulfillment order that is at a 3PL fulfillment service.
